query:
SELECT 
  is_bad_debt_row,
  is_close_row,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE debt_range IS NULL
GROUP BY is_bad_debt_row, is_close_row;
command:

  is_close_row,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM debt_collected_cache
